description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the owitzia/tucker Docker image and set the OMPI_ALLOW_RUN_AS_ROOT, OMPI_ALLOW_RUN_AS_ROOT_CONFIRM, and OMPI_MCA_rmaps_base_oversubscribe variables. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `cmake ../src`, and `make`, and stores the resulting build/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that depends on the build job and runs `cd build` followed by `ctest --output-on-failure`. Finally, add a pages job (deploy stage) that runs `doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile` and `mv doxygen/documentation/html/ public/`, publishing the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
